name: dev
description: Developer toolkit (unified) — single DEV agent that owns spec → TDD implementation → self-review → verification across any stack (frontend, backend, mobile). Bundles karpathy-guidelines (LLM coding behavioral guardrails) and vercel-react-best-practices (React/Next.js performance patterns); references /simplify (system skill) for cleanup passes. Project memory recall is delegated to /second-brain:project-memory-recall with role=dev so the same generic skill serves all roles.
